<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\ControlStructures; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\ConstFetch; use PhpParser\Node\Name; use PhpParser\Node\Stmt\Do_; class DoWhileAlwaysFalse extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'ControlStructures'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Makes the condition in a do-while loop always false.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' do { // ... } while ($a < 100); // [tl! remove] } while (false); // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [Do_::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var Do_ $node */ $node->cond = new ConstFetch(new Name('false')); return $node; } }
